348.reason: [The condition logic is flawed and may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing tokens.get(index+1) or tokens.get(index+2) near the end of token list; also the logic for distinguishing declarations from function definitions is incorrect as it doesn't properly check for FuncType keywords (VOIDTK, INTTK, CHARTK) followed by IDENFR and LPARENT]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition logic is flawed and may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing tokens.get(index+1) or tokens.get(index+2) near the end of token list; also the logic for distinguishing declarations from function definitions is incorrect as it doesn't properly check for FuncType keywords (VOIDTK, INTTK, CHARTK) followed by IDENFR and LPARENT]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition is flawed: it accesses tokens.get(index+1) and tokens.get(index+2) without checking if index+1 or index+2 are within bounds, which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, the logic for detecting FuncDef vs Decl is incorrect because a function definition starts with FuncType (VOIDTK/INTTK/CHARTK), not necessarily followed immediately by MAINTK or LPARENT in the way checked here.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition is logically incorrect and may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing tokens.get(index+1) or tokens.get(index+2) near the end of token list; also the logic for detecting FuncDef vs MainFuncDef is flawed because it doesn't properly check if current position is a valid function definition start]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition is flawed: it accesses tokens.get(index+1) and tokens.get(index+2) without checking if index+1 or index+2 are within bounds, which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Additionally, the logic for detecting FuncDef vs MainFuncDef is incorrect because it assumes that any non-const declaration followed by something that isn't "main" must be a function, but doesn't properly check for FuncType keywords like "void", "int", or "char" at the current index.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition is logically incorrect and may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing tokens.get(index+1) or tokens.get(index+2) near the end of token list; also fails to properly distinguish between Decl, FuncDef, and MainFuncDef according to grammar]

352.reason: [This condition may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing tokens.get(index+1) if index is at the last token; also the logic fails to properly identify where function definitions end and main function begins]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing tokens.get(index+1) if index is at the last token; also the logic fails to properly identify where function definitions end and main function begins]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Again accesses tokens.get(index+1) without bounds check, and the condition is wrong: MainFuncDef starts with "int main()", but FuncDef starts with other type keywords. This loop condition will fail to correctly identify where FuncDefs end and MainFuncDef begins.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 exceeds token list bounds, and incorrectly assumes that any non-MainFuncDef after declarations must be FuncDef without proper validation]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Again accesses tokens.get(index+1) without bounds checking, and the condition is wrong: it should check if the current token sequence starts a FuncDef (by looking for FuncType at current index), not look ahead to see if the next token after current is "main". This will fail to parse function definitions correctly and may infinite loop or crash.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing tokens.get(index+1); also incorrectly assumes that anything before MAINTK must be FuncDef, ignoring possible Decl tokens that might appear after initial ConstDecl but before FuncDef]
